_doc: Sound Council / audio-coverage registry (BACKLOG #87 -- 'reviews every sound'). This is the review RUBRIC + the council MEMBER lenses used by SoundCouncilSystem to audit every DECLARED audio cue in the game (MusicSystem states/stingers/zone-region-biome beds, UISoundSystem cues, and the VoiceRegistry speaker roster) and report which ones are authored vs still SILENT. The tone/loudness/clipping criteria are ADVISORY -- most stems are not on disk yet, so the council cannot meter a file that does not exist; the one hard, observable criterion is 'exists'. The value here is AUDIO-QA visibility: it tracks exactly what is still silent and needs authoring.

criteria.name: Exists
criteria.desc: the stem is actually on disk and imports; a missing file is silence, plain and simple

criteria.name: Loudness
criteria.desc: integrated loudness sits inside the mix window (advisory until the authored file is metered)

criteria.name: Tone fit
criteria.desc: timbre suits the gothic-medieval canon and the scene it plays in (advisory -- needs an ear)

criteria.name: No clipping
criteria.desc: no digital clipping or true-peak overs (advisory until the authored file is metered)

members.name: The Clarion
members.stance: A cue must read in a single hearing. If the player cannot tell what it means without looking, it has failed.

members.name: The Mourner
members.stance: Sound carries the world's grief and its small warmths. The wrong feeling is worse than silence.

members.name: The Leveler
members.stance: Nothing shouts over the moment, nothing hides beneath it. Headroom is respect for the ear.

members.name: The Keeper
members.stance: Every timbre answers to the canon. No modern gloss, no sound that could not exist in this age of the world.

voice_lines._doc: The NPC voice speakers the council expects covered. A speaker is PRESENT when at least one baked line exists under res://assets/vo/<speaker>/. Keyed to the VoiceRegistry roster.
